# Legislator

One row per person who has ever served in Congress. Bioguide ID is the canonical primary key used across all unitedstates/* datasets.

**GraphQL type:** `Legislator` · **Connection:** `LegislatorsConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allLegislators(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `LegislatorsConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `legislatorByBioguideId(bioguideId: String!)` | `Legislator` | Look up by primary key |
| `legislatorByThomasId(thomasId: String!)` | `Legislator` | Look up by unique `thomasId` |
| `legislatorByLisId(lisId: String!)` | `Legislator` | Look up by unique `lisId` |
| `legislatorByGovtrackId(govtrackId: Int!)` | `Legislator` | Look up by unique `govtrackId` |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `bioguideId` | `String` | Canonical legislator identifier from the Congressional Biographical Directory. Use this as the stable cross-system key. <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `thomasId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#6c757d',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>unique</span> |
| `lisId` | `String` | Used in Senate roll call XML to identify members. Essential for matching Senate vote records. <span style={{background:'#6c757d',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>unique</span> |
| `govtrackId` | `Int` |  <span style={{background:'#6c757d',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>unique</span> |
| `opensecretsId` | `String` |  |
| `votesmartId` | `Int` |  |
| `icpsrId` | `Int` |  |
| `cspanId` | `Int` |  |
| `firstName` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `middleName` | `String` |  |
| `lastName` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `nameSuffix` | `String` |  |
| `nickname` | `String` |  |
| `officialFull` | `String` |  |
| `birthday` | `Date` |  |
| `gender` | `String` | One of: `M`, `F` |
| `createdAt` | `Datetime` |  |
| `updatedAt` | `Datetime` |  |

## Relationships

### Has many

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `legislatorTermsByBioguideId` | `LegislatorTermsConnection` | `bioguideId` |
| `billsBySponsorBioguideId` | `BillsConnection` | `sponsorBioguideId` |
| `votePositionsByBioguideId` | `VotePositionsConnection` | `bioguideId` |
| `billCosponsorsByBioguideId` | `BillCosponsorsConnection` | `bioguideId` |
| `committeeMembershipsByBioguideId` | `CommitteeMembershipsConnection` | `bioguideId` |

## Example

```graphql
{
  allLegislators(
    filter: { lastName: { equalTo: "Warren" } }
    orderBy: LAST_NAME_ASC
    first: 5
  ) {
    nodes {
      bioguideId
      officialFull
      birthday
      gender
    }
  }
}
```
